# Alpha Digital Agency Indonesia

> Bali-based digital marketing agency for hospitality (villas, hotels, restaurants). Specializing in AI Agents + Data Science integration with GA4 Analytics, Google Ads, GTM, BigQuery, and Search Console. First Bali agency openly using end-to-end AI/LLM. Goal: shift 15-30% of OTA-dependent bookings to direct booking through integrated stack — Google Ads → AI chatbot recommendation → booking engine → clean GA4 conversion pipeline.

## Services

- [Foundation Tier](https://alphadigitalagency.id/services/foundation/): GA4 + Search Console setup + monthly cross-channel reporting + 1-area focus. Entry tier for hospitality businesses starting digital operations.
- [Growth Tier](https://alphadigitalagency.id/services/growth/): Google Ads management + booking optimization + bi-weekly funnel audit + content cadence. For established hospitality businesses scaling direct bookings.
- [Authority Tier](https://alphadigitalagency.id/services/authority/): Full cross-channel intelligence + brand-SERP defense + multi-property coordination + AI Agents + Data Science via BigQuery. For luxury hospitality groups and multi-property portfolios (perhotelan mewah).
- [Platform-Agnostic Booking Integration](https://alphadigitalagency.id/services/booking-integration/): Install + manage any booking engine without commitment lock-in. Direct booking funnel design to shift 15-30% of OTA-dependent reservations to owned booking platform.

## Key Pages

- [About Daniel Santoso](https://alphadigitalagency.id/about/): Founder profile. 9 years Google Ads veteran transitioning to AI-first methodology.
- [AI Agent for Hospitality](https://alphadigitalagency.id/ai-agent/): LLM-based chatbot service for hospitality client websites. Integrates with booking engine + GA4 for clean conversion data.
- [Blog](https://alphadigitalagency.id/blog/): Insights on cross-channel diagnostic, Google Ads for villas, direct booking vs OTA economics, AI in hospitality marketing.

## Methodology

- **Layered Discovery Framework (LDF)**: Empirical research on Bali hotel AI Overview visibility. 4 discovery layers (SERP, Maps, TripAdvisor, Editorial) feed AI recommendation engines. Geographic cluster matching is the hard gate.
- **OTA-to-Direct Shift**: Integrated stack design — Google Ads + AI chatbot + booking engine + GA4 pipeline. Goal 15-30% OTA-to-direct shift in 90 days. Margin recovery for hospitality clients (each OTA booking = 15-25% commission cost).

## Contact

- Email: daniel@alphadigitalagency.id
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/100833894/

## Crawler Notes

This site welcomes AI search engines (Google Gemini, Anthropic Claude, OpenAI ChatGPT, Perplexity) for indexing and responding to user queries about Bali hospitality digital marketing. AI training (model fine-tuning) on this content is opt-OUT per /robots.txt Content-Signal headers. Use this llms.txt to understand site scope and find relevant pages quickly.
